rows.title: Extra Shift Die
rows.description: Add another Cyan shift/control D6 for this run.

rows.title: Extra Mark Die
rows.description: Add another Helios mark/control D6 for this run.

rows.title: Extra Guard Die
rows.description: Add another Aurian guard/counter D6 for this run.

rows.title: Clean Cyan Core
rows.description: Replace Cyan's volatile core die with a stable pulse die for this run.

rows.title: Steady Wild Path
rows.description: Replace Helios' wild die with a stable hunt die for this run.

rows.title: Tempered Might
rows.description: Replace Aurian's volatile might die with a stable blade die for this run.

rows.title: Pulse Carbine
rows.description: Equip a tech weapon that rewards multi-hit overload starts.

rows.title: Hunter Scope
rows.description: Equip a precision weapon that opens mark payoffs for any hero.

rows.title: Blood Whetstone
rows.description: Equip a risky weapon for self-damage finishers.

rows.title: Glass Fang
rows.description: Equip a risky weapon that boosts attack density.

rows.title: Throwing Harness
rows.description: Equip a pierce finisher weapon.

rows.title: Heat Sink Plating
rows.description: Equip armor that softens overheat and self-damage risk.

rows.title: Iron Banner
rows.description: Equip armor that turns big block turns into counter pressure.

rows.title: Guardian Totem
rows.description: Equip armor that protects summon builds.

rows.title: Field Jacket
rows.description: Equip stable armor that grants battle-start block.

rows.title: Spiked Guard
rows.description: Equip risky armor for retaliation builds.

rows.title: Lucky Knuckle
rows.description: Equip a passive item that protects reroll tempo.

rows.title: Old Compass
rows.description: Equip a passive item that improves event safety.

rows.title: Micro Drone Dock
rows.description: Equip an active item for summon and drone starts.

rows.title: Companion Whistle
rows.description: Equip an active item for summon burst turns.

rows.title: Forge Needle
rows.description: Equip a craft item that opens enchant routing.

rows.title: Risk Ledger
rows.description: Equip a passive item that converts negative faces into rerolls.

rows.title: Emergency Battery
rows.description: Equip an active resource item with a risk tail.

rows.title: Spark Edge
rows.description: Enchant Cyan Pulse face 1 with +1 damage.

rows.title: Guard Rune
rows.description: Enchant Cyan Shift face 1 with +2 block.

rows.title: Marking Rune
rows.description: Enchant Helios Mark face 1 with +1 mark.

rows.title: Echo Chip
rows.description: Enchant Aurian Blade face 1 with a small echo hit.

rows.title: Focus Thread
rows.description: Enchant Cyan Shift face 2 with +1 reroll.

rows.title: Overload Capacitor
rows.description: Enchant Cyan Core face 1: gain +1 Overload when resolved.

rows.title: Quiver Thread
rows.description: Enchant Helios Hunt face 3: restore +1 Quiver when resolved.

rows.title: Stance Oath
rows.description: Enchant Aurian Guard face 3: gain +1 Stance when resolved.

rows.title: Negative Focus
rows.description: Enchant a risky negative face so resolving it restores +1 reroll.

rows.title: Piercing Rune
rows.description: Replace or add an enchant on Cyan Pulse face 4: next attack ignores +2 block.

rows.title: Rupture Sigil
rows.description: Replace or add an enchant on Aurian Blade face 2: next hit gains rupture payoff.

rows.title: Cyan Reactor Swap
rows.description: Upgrade one stable Pulse D6 into a high-risk Core D6 for this run.

rows.title: Helios Wild Hunt
rows.description: Upgrade one Hunt D6 into a high-risk Wild D6 for this run.

rows.title: Aurian Might Path
rows.description: Upgrade one Guard D6 into a high-risk Might D6 for this run.

rows.title: Cyan Fireline Pivot
rows.description: Replace one Shift D6 with a Pulse D6 for a cleaner ranged plan.

rows.title: Helios Hunt Pivot
rows.description: Replace one Mark D6 with a Hunt D6 for more direct damage.

rows.title: Aurian Blade Pivot
rows.description: Replace one Guard D6 with a Blade D6 for more execution pressure.
